name: Ingram CoreSource
description: Enterprise Ingram CoreSource integration scaffold for publisher asset, metadata, and distribution workflows. CoreSource API contracts are account-specific; configure the provisioned API host and adjust paths if Ingram supplies a different route set.

credential_fields.name: api_host
credential_fields.label: API host
credential_fields.description: Host supplied by Ingram, for example a CoreSource or gateway host without https://.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Access token
credential_fields.description: Bearer token or API token provisioned by Ingram.

tools.name: list_titles
tools.description: List titles from an Ingram/CoreSource enterprise title endpoint. Confirm this path against the account-specific contract.

tools.name: get_title
tools.description: Fetch one title by provider ID. Confirm this path against the account-specific contract.

tools.name: upsert_title
tools.description: Create or update title metadata. Body should follow the Ingram-provided schema for this account.

tools.name: create_title
tools.description: Create a title metadata record. Body should follow the Ingram-provided schema for this account.

tools.name: list_assets
tools.description: List digital assets/files in CoreSource. Confirm this path against the account-specific contract.

type.description: Asset type, for example epub, pdf, cover, audiobook.

tools.name: create_distribution_job
tools.description: Create a distribution/delivery job using the account-specific Ingram contract.

body.description: Distribution job payload supplied by Ingram.
